basic_details.job_title: ICAR NBPGR Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Scientist III and Field Worker Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources (ICAR-NBPGR)
basic_details.post_name: Project Scientist III and Field Worker
basic_details.short_information: The ICAR National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources (ICAR NBPGR) has officially announced the Project Scientist III and Field Worker Recruitment 2026 with 3 temporary vacancies. Candidates with a Doctoral Degree in Science for Project Scientist-III and a Graduate Degree for Field Worker posts are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can appear for the walk-in interview scheduled on 20 July 2026. Check the official notification for eligibility criteria, age limit, salary details, and selection process.

age_limit.age_details: Max 45 years for Project Scientist - III, Max 50 years for Field Worker.
age_limit.details: Project Scientist III: Maximum age limit is 45 years. Field Worker: Maximum age limit is 50 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctoral Degree in Science for Project Scientist - III, Graduate degree for Field Worker.
qualification.details: Project Scientist III: Doctoral Degree in Science (Plant Pathology/ Entomology/ Nematology/ Agricultural Biotechnology/ Biotechnology/ Botany/ Zoology/ Molecular Biology/ Plant Genetic Resources/ Life Sciences from a recognized University or equivalent Degree) with Seven years' relevant experience and in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific Activities and Services in the area. Field Worker: Graduate degree in any discipline.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 78,000/- plus 27% HRA for Project Scientist - III, Rs 18,000/- plus 27% HRA for Field Worker

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: ICAR NBPGR Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ICAR NBPGR Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ICAR NBPGR Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR NBPGR Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Scientist III: Doctoral Degree in Science (Plant Pathology/ Entomology/ Nematology/ Agricultural Biotechnology/ Biotechnology/ Botany/ Zoology/ Molecular Biology/ Plant Genetic Resources/ Life Sciences from a recognized University or equivalent Degree) with Seven years' relevant experience and in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific Activities and Services in the area. Field Worker: Graduate degree in any discipline.

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-NBPGR Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Project Scientist III: Maximum age limit is 45 years. Field Worker: Maximum age limit is 50 years.

rows.event: Walk-in Interview for Project Scientist III

content_sections.heading: ICAR NBPGR Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR-NBPGR Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR-NBPGR recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on the specified date, which is 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in the ICAR-NBPGR recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts are Project Scientist - III and Field Worker.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Scientist - III?
faq.answer: A Doctoral Degree in Science with seven years of relevant experience is required for the Project Scientist - III position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Field Worker post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Field Worker post is 50 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Project Scientist - III?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Scientist - III is Rs 78,000/- plus 27% HRA.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are there for Project Scientist - III?
faq.answer: There are 2 vacancies for the Project Scientist - III post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110012.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry original and self-attested photocopies of age proof, educational qualifications, experience, publications, and awards.
